text:
error messages while installing freebsd 8.2
unixODBC 2.3.0_1 conflicts libodbc 3.52.7
xscreensaver-gnome-hacks 5.12
conflicts xscreensaver 5.1.2_1

Fix: 

dont know 
thinhing the problem with resolving package dependences
How-To-Repeat: when installing freebsd 8.2 select all packages
when prompting package select screen
the system tries install gnome + libs +kde +libs and misc
